title: NKKD-176 This time my wife (30) was taken by my part-time job (20) ... → I'm sorry, so please release the AV as it is. (NKKD-176)
description: From early this spring, my wife started part-time work about four times a week, hoping to add to her household budget. Until then, I had been a child-rearing housewife, so I was smiling and watching over my wife, who seemed to be having fun with Nandakanda, thinking that it was good for me as a husband to help my household. However, recently, the wife seems to be having a cup of tea and chatting at home with a young man like Hatachi who says he is working part-time at the same workplace.
